description: Message is queued for delivery. It has been accepted by the system and is waiting to be sent to WhatsApp.
Message has been submitted to the WhatsApp channel successfully.
Message was delivered successfully to the recipient's device.
Message was read by the recipient.
Message dropped — media not assigned to the message.
Message dropped — service not assigned. The WhatsApp service is not configured for this account.
Message dropped — recipient number is not in the opt-in list. Cannot send messages to users who have not opted in.
Message dropped — recipient number is in the opt-out list. User has unsubscribed from messages.
Message dropped — recipient phone number is invalid or does not exist.
Message dropped — WABA sender not found. The WhatsApp Business Account sender is not configured correctly.
Message dropped — invalid request. The message request is malformed or missing required fields.
Message dropped — template not found. The template name used does not exist in the approved template list.
System error while dispatching the request to the channel gateway. Internal dispatch failure.
Invalid media file type. The file format is not supported by WhatsApp. Supported formats include jpg, png, pdf, mp4, mp3, ogg and others. Received file was of unsupported type.
Phone number is not registered on WhatsApp. The recipient does not have an active WhatsApp account on that number.
Service not ready. The WhatsApp service is temporarily unavailable or not initialized.
Account is blocked. The WhatsApp Business Account has been blocked from sending messages.
Recipient is not a valid WhatsApp user. The phone number exists but is not registered on WhatsApp.
User's number is part of a Meta internal experiment. Message was not delivered due to Meta's testing restrictions.
Pair rate limit hit — too many messages sent from this business number to the same recipient in a short period. Wait before retrying to this specific number.
Internal error — the media URL provided could not be accessed due to SSL handshake failure. Check that the media URL uses a valid SSL certificate.
Internal server error from WhatsApp Business API. This is on Meta's side and usually temporary.
Something went wrong on Meta's end. Generic internal error. Usually temporary — retry after some time.
Generic error — client could not display the template. Template structure may be unavailable or malformed.
Parameter value is not valid. One or more values passed in the API request are incorrect or out of accepted range.
Template hydrated text too long — after filling in variable values, the translated text exceeds WhatsApp's character limit.
Required parameter is missing — a mandatory field like buttons was not included in the request.
Message too long — message body exceeds 4096 characters. Shorten the message before retrying.
Invalid parameter — one or more parameters in the request are not recognized or invalid.
Required parameter is missing — a mandatory field was not included in the API request.
Template parameter count mismatch — the number of variable values sent does not match the number of placeholders defined in the approved template.
Parameter value not valid — one or more parameter values in the request are invalid or incorrectly formatted.
Message is not valid — the request payload is malformed or contains invalid values.

Requested entity was not found — the resource or endpoint being accessed does not exist. This could mean the phone number, template, or WABA ID referenced in the request is invalid or has been deleted.
The operation is blocked — access to this resource has been denied. The account or resource may be restricted, suspended, or the action is not permitted under current account permissions.

Traffic limit reached — the allowed message traffic limit for this user or agent has been exceeded. This message will not be delivered. Wait before retrying and reduce the frequency of messages sent to this recipient.
TTL expiration revoked — the message's time-to-live expired before it could be delivered. The message was cancelled because it was not delivered within the allowed time window.
Access denied — the business account does not have permission to perform this action.
Spam rate limit hit — too many messages flagged or blocked by users. WhatsApp has temporarily restricted outgoing messages from this number.
Message undeliverable — the message could not be delivered. Recipient may not be on WhatsApp, number may be invalid, or user may have blocked the business.
Spam rate limit hit — too many previous messages were reported as spam. WhatsApp has restricted this number's messaging ability to protect platform quality.

Meta chose not to deliver this message to maintain a healthy user engagement ecosystem. This typically happens when the recipient has been receiving too many marketing messages from multiple businesses. It is not necessarily because the user blocked your business. Do not retry immediately — wait and increase retry intervals gradually.

Unable to deliver the message — the recipient has explicitly chosen to stop receiving marketing messages on WhatsApp from your business. This is a permanent opt-out by the user. Do not retry sending marketing messages to this number.

Media upload error — the media file could not be uploaded to WhatsApp servers. File may exceed size limits, be in an unsupported format, or the media URL may be inaccessible. Ensure the file is under 100MB and the URL is publicly accessible.
Business eligibility payment issue — the business account has a billing or payment problem that is preventing messages from being sent.
Receiver incapable — the recipient's device or WhatsApp version cannot receive this type of message.
Sender account has been locked — the sending WhatsApp Business Account is locked, likely due to policy violations or suspicious activity.
Account has been locked — the WhatsApp Business Account is locked. No messages can be sent until it is unlocked via Meta Business Manager.
User's number is part of a Meta experiment — message was not delivered due to Meta's internal testing. This is outside the business's control.
Re-engagement message failed — the 24-hour customer service messaging window has closed. A template message must be used to re-initiate the conversation.
Server temporarily unavailable — Meta's WhatsApp server is down or under maintenance. Retry after some time.
Re-engagement message failed — messaging window expired. Use an approved template to restart the conversation.
No response from WhatsApp — the message was sent but no delivery confirmation was received from WhatsApp servers.
Template does not exist — the template name used in the request has not been created or approved for this WhatsApp Business Account.
Template missing — the specified template could not be found in the system.
Parameter format mismatch — the format of a parameter does not match what was defined in the approved template header.
Message expired — the message was not delivered within the allowed time window and has now expired.
Template hydrated text too long — final message text after variable substitution exceeds character limits.
Internal server error from WhatsApp Business API. Meta side issue — usually temporary.
Template format character policy violated — the template contains characters or formatting that violates WhatsApp's content policies.
Unclassified error — does not fall into a standard category. Requires manual investigation.
Business eligibility payment issue — billing problem affecting the account's ability to send messages.
